# Tourvia — llms-full.txt
# Detailed product reference for AI assistants and language models.
# For the short version, see /llms.txt
# Supplemental reference only. The public HTML pages and /product-facts.md remain authoritative.
# Last verified: 11 July 2026

> Tourvia, formerly RouteForce, is a 100% Salesforce-native route planning, route optimization, and field visit tracking application operated by SKZ Consulting. It runs inside Salesforce as a managed package, with no separate field app, no data sync workflow, and no separate login for reps.

## Brand note

Tourvia is the current product name. RouteForce is the former product name. SKZ Consulting is the operator and legal entity. RouteForce may still appear in historical URLs, screenshots, package internals, Custom Metadata API names, or older articles. Public product naming should use Tourvia.

## Product overview

Tourvia helps field sales teams plan visits, optimize driving routes, and track field activity without leaving Salesforce. It works on record pages, app pages, tabs, utility bar, Campaign pages, and Salesforce Mobile.

### Core capabilities
- **Interactive map**: display Accounts, Leads, Opportunities, and Campaign Members on a single map with clustering, coloring, and real-time filters
- **Campaign Member mapping**: show Lead and Contact members from Campaign record pages or from the global app map with a target Campaign picker and status-based colors
- **Route optimization**: constraint-aware engine considers time windows, lunch breaks, visit durations, and distance constraints to calculate efficient multi-stop routes
- **Auto event creation**: convert an optimized route into Salesforce Events in one click — no re-typing
- **GPS check-in/check-out**: verified field visits with configurable checkout forms (result, next action, notes, satisfaction, order amount, next visit date, plus admin-defined custom fields)
- **Visit reports**: structured post-visit data linked to the Salesforce record
- **Heatmap & lasso select**: visualize density and batch-select records on the map
- **Saved filters**: save, name, and share filter configurations across teams
- **Route history**: every planned route is persisted — replay, compare coverage over time
- **Custom actions**: launch Screen Flows, click-to-call, or navigate directly from map markers via configurable Lightning Web Components
- **Dashboards & reports**: 2 dashboards and 18 native Salesforce reports included out of the box
- **Mobile**: full functionality in Salesforce Mobile App — map, routes, check-in, navigation handoff

### Technical architecture
- 100% Lightning Web Component (LWC) implementation
- Configuration via Custom Metadata Types: RouteForceConfig__mdt and RouteForceAction__mdt
- 3 permission sets: Tourvia Admin, Tourvia Manager, Tourvia User
- Route optimization is operated by Tourvia on its own infrastructure
- Routing server hosted in France (OVHcloud, Gravelines datacenter) for GDPR-conscious deployments
- Salesforce remains the system of record; route calculations use only the geocoordinates and timing parameters required for routing
- Worldwide routing coverage

## Pricing

Tourvia uses clear per-user pricing:

| Plan | Price | Scope |
|------|-------|-------|
| 30-day trial | On request | Qualified Salesforce orgs can request a 30-day trial via the contact form |
| Tourvia Pro | €30/user/month excl. tax, billed annually | Route optimization, GPS check-in, visit reports, dashboards, route history, Salesforce-native field execution |
| Installation | Customer-managed | The Salesforce admin installs and configures Tourvia using the published documentation |

- Annual equivalent for Pro: €360/user/year
- Larger enterprise or multi-entity deployments can be quoted separately when needed
- No public free plan is offered
- Trial access is requested through the contact form, not positioned as a free AppExchange tier
- No routing API pass-through fees from Tourvia; route optimization is included in the subscription

## Comparison with Salesforce Maps

| Criterion | Tourvia | Salesforce Maps |
|-----------|---------|-----------------|
| Architecture | Managed package / Salesforce-native LWC workflow | Salesforce add-on product |
| Pricing model | €30/user/month, billed annually | Public list prices of $75/user/month for Maps and $150/user/month for Maps Advanced, billed annually, verified on Salesforce.com on 11 July 2026 |
| Cost for 10 users | €300/month equivalent, billed annually | $750-$1,500/month equivalent before contract specifics |
| Cost for 20 users | €600/month equivalent, billed annually | $1,500-$3,000/month equivalent before contract specifics |
| Route optimization | Tourvia-operated, constraint-aware engine | Proprietary |
| Data residency for routing infrastructure | France (OVHcloud) | Salesforce infrastructure / vendor contract specifics |
| Trial access | 30-day trial on request via contact form | Verify with Salesforce account team |
| Installation/evaluation | Qualified Salesforce org evaluation coordinated after request | Salesforce add-on license process |
| Mobile | Full Salesforce Mobile support | Salesforce Mobile support |

## Use cases

1. **Field sales route planning**: plan daily/weekly visit routes optimized for travel time
2. **Visit planning & scheduling**: create Salesforce Events from optimized routes
3. **Campaign Member field follow-up**: map Campaign Members, understand regional coverage, and plan local follow-up for Lead and Contact members
4. **Territory coverage analysis**: visualize which accounts have been visited and which are overdue
5. **Customer proximity discovery**: find nearby accounts from current GPS position
6. **Field activity reporting**: structured check-in/check-out with visit outcome data
7. **Manager oversight**: dashboards showing team route history, visit frequency, coverage gaps

## Frequently asked questions

**Q: Does Salesforce include built-in route planning?**
A: No. Salesforce does not provide full route planning and route optimization in the standard platform. Tourvia adds these capabilities as a Salesforce-native managed package.

**Q: Can Tourvia map Salesforce Campaign Members?**
A: Yes. Tourvia can display Campaign Members from a Campaign record page or from the global app map with a target Campaign picker. Both Lead and Contact members are geolocated from their parent record address, and status colors are configurable through Custom Metadata.

**Q: Is customer data sent to external servers?**
A: Salesforce remains the system of record. Route calculations use only the geocoordinates and time parameters required for routing. The routing server does not store customer CRM records.

**Q: How does the optimization algorithm work?**
A: Tourvia operates a constraint-aware routing engine. It considers GPS coordinates, time constraints, visit durations, and configurable parameters to calculate an efficient visit order.

**Q: Does Tourvia work outside of Europe?**
A: Yes. Tourvia provides worldwide routing coverage. The routing infrastructure handles requests globally.

**Q: Can I use Tourvia on my phone?**
A: Yes. Tourvia is designed for the Salesforce Mobile App. GPS geolocation, check-in, and navigation handoff to Google Maps/Waze/Apple Maps are included.

**Q: What Salesforce editions are supported?**
A: Tourvia works on Salesforce editions that support managed packages and Lightning Web Components, subject to org configuration and permissions.

**Q: How long does setup take?**
A: Installation and configuration are completed by the customer’s Salesforce admin using the published documentation.

**Q: Is there a public no-cost plan?**
A: No. Tourvia offers a 30-day trial on request via the contact form for qualified Salesforce orgs, then a paid annual subscription.
